## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `scripts/quickstart_smoke.sh`

## Docs

- [ ] README updated if public workflow changed
- [ ] `README.zh-CN.md` updated if README changed
- [ ] quickstart / API docs updated if public commands or contracts changed

## Risks

- security, compatibility, migration, or rollout notes
